strategy_name: Optimize Singapore Fab 12i P3 / No New External Expansion
strategic_rationale: Prioritize Fab 12i P3 ramp, customer qualification, utilization, and capital efficiency before committing to new non-Singapore expansion.
decision_supported: Proceed with Fab 12i P3 execution focus; keep external options monitored but do not approve new external capex.
next_action: Track P3 ramp, customer qualification, utilization, margin, and capex discipline before opening external Stage 1 workstreams.

strategic_rationale: Malaysia has the deepest nearby OSAT and packaging ecosystem, but ecosystem strength does not automatically create UMC customer demand or acceptable economics.
decision_supported: Stay in Watchlist until customer overlap, packaging attach-rate, partner economics, incentives, and ROIC are validated.
next_action: Build named customer overlap, attach-rate, partner shortlist, incentive, and ROIC model before Stage 1.

strategic_rationale: Vietnam is relevant as an EMS-linked customer engineering and account-operations option, but UMC-specific customer support demand is still proxy-based.
decision_supported: Keep monitoring; do not launch a hub until named customer workflows and technical support demand are validated.
next_action: Map EMS-linked UMC customers and support workflows that require local engineering rather than regional account coverage.

strategic_rationale: Thailand has automotive, industrial, power, and electronics demand signals relevant to UMC specialty processes, but customer-specific demand remains unvalidated.
decision_supported: Use as a demand-sensing watchlist; do not open Stage 1 unless named accounts justify coverage or engineering support.
next_action: Validate automotive, power, and industrial account overlap with Fab 12i product families.

strategic_rationale: The Philippines may fit support, account operations, and selected technical escalation workflows, but the role must be specific rather than generic back-office support.
decision_supported: Keep as a support-model watchlist; do not launch without validated workflows, talent fit, and escalation model.
next_action: Define whether the opportunity is account operations, quality triage, FAE support, or documentation support.

strategic_rationale: Indonesia has long-term market, policy, and IC design signals, but those signals do not yet imply manufacturing or customer-support readiness for UMC.
decision_supported: Monitor policy and customer development; do not approve capex or Stage 1 operating setup.
next_action: Monitor IC design, policy, and end-market development for evidence of UMC-relevant mature-node demand.
